description_long: This object is a modern pump-action shotgun with a matte black finish, featuring a long, cylindrical barrel and a robust tubular magazine beneath it. The stock is a full, synthetic design, ergonomically shaped for shoulder support and recoil absorption. The receiver is compact and streamlined, with a visible rail on top for mounting optics or accessories. The fore-end is ribbed for grip and is clearly designed to be pumped back and forth to chamber rounds. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing ample space for finger access, and the trigger itself is set within easy reach. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, suitable for tactical or law enforcement use in urban environments.
description: A matte black, pump-action shotgun with a full synthetic stock, ribbed fore-end, and a long barrel with an under-barrel magazine. The design is robust and utilitarian, ideal for tactical or law enforcement scenarios.
description_view_0: The shotgun is seen from the muzzle end, showing a narrow, cylindrical profile with the barrel and magazine tube aligned vertically.
description_view_1: A full side view reveals the entire length of the shotgun, including the full stock, ribbed pump fore-end, long barrel, and under-barrel magazine.
description_view_2: Viewed from the butt end, the shotgun appears as a slim vertical shape, with the stock and barrel aligned and minimal detail visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays the same features as view 1, including the full stock, pump fore-end, and barrel, but from the other side.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long cylindrical barrel with under-barrel magazine tube and no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
